discoverability.competitive_assessment: Day 25 stasis on the dome side. All dome machine-readable files (ai_manifest.json, llms.txt, llms-full.txt, sitemap.xml) byte-identical to yesterday. Our review pipeline active and healthy — decider ran this morning with triage and curmudgeon processing. Our llms.txt accurately describes current state (71 entries, 69 dome WINs, 94.5% dome figure, 0 claims survive scrutiny). No search surface has indexed our review or the dome model under any of the searched terms. The competitive discoverability gap is not strategic — both sites have low or zero indexed web presence for the specific technical vocabulary. The dome's AI-steering infrastructure (ai_manifest.json, inject_ai_layer.py) is frozen and increasingly stale.

no_action_gaps.reasoning: The dome has 25 URLs pointing to its many sub-pages. Our sitemap covers the review root and llms.txt. Our site structure is simpler by design; adding more sitemap entries would only matter if we have indexed sub-pages, which we currently do not. Not a priority until GSC verification is complete.
